description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a landscaped garden with various trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a spacious open-plan layout visible through the transparent walls. The front area includes a paved driveway with a parked car, leading to the main entrance. Outdoor seating and patio furniture are arranged on a terrace, enhancing the living space. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with wooden and glass elements dominating the facade. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a landscaped garden featuring trees and a driveway with a car.
description_view_0: The bungalow is seen from an elevated angle, highlighting the front facade, glass walls, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the open-plan interior, outdoor patio furniture, and the rear garden area.
description_view_2: The front driveway with a car, main entrance, and symmetrical landscaping are prominent in this view.
description_view_3: The opposite side shows the terrace, more garden elements, and the flat roof's expanse.
